heading: Coral Reef Stewardship Fund
label: 6407 Coral Reef Stewardship Fund
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6407, , , , required submission of reports documenting the effectiveness of the coral reef conservation grant program and describing activities undertaken to implement the national coral reef strategy, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. children.heading: Agreement
children.label: a Agreement
children.text: The Administrator shall seek to enter into an agreement with the National Fish and Wildlife Foundation (in this section referred to as the “Foundation”), authorizing the Foundation to receive, hold, and administer funds received under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: be known as the “Coral Reef Stewardship Fund” (in this section referred to as the “Fund”); and

children.label: B
children.text: serve as the successor to the account known before , as the Coral Reef Conservation Fund and administered through a public-private partnership with the Foundation.December 23, 2022

children.heading: Deposits
children.label: 2 Deposits
children.text: The Foundation shall deposit funds received under this section into the Fund.

children.label: A
children.text: further the purposes of this chapter; and

children.label: i
children.text: the National Coral Reef Resilience Strategy; and

children.label: ii
children.text: coral reef action plans in effect, if any, under covering a coral reef or ecologically significant component of a coral reef to be impacted by such activities, if applicable.section 6404 of this title

children.heading: Investment of amounts
children.label: A Investment of amounts
children.text: The Foundation shall invest such portion of the Fund as is not required to meet current withdrawals in interest-bearing obligations of the United States or in obligations guaranteed as to both principal and interest by the United States.

children.heading: Interest and proceeds
children.label: B Interest and proceeds
children.text: The interest on, and the proceeds from the sale or redemption of, any obligations held in the Fund shall be credited to and form a part of the Fund.

children.label: B
children.text: the National Coral Reef Resilience Strategy.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Pursuant to an agreement entered into under subsection (a), the Foundation may accept, receive, solicit, hold, administer, and use any gift (including, notwithstanding , donations of services) to further the purposes of this chapter.section 1342 of title 31

children.heading: Deposits in Fund
children.label: 2 Deposits in Fund
children.text: Notwithstanding , any funds received as a gift shall be deposited and maintained in the Fund.section 3302 of title 31

children.heading: Administration
children.label: d Administration
children.text: Under an agreement entered into pursuant to subsection (a), and subject to the availability of appropriations, the Administrator may transfer funds appropriated for such purposes to carry out this chapter to the Foundation. Amounts received by the Foundation under this subsection may be used for matching, in whole or in part, contributions (whether in money, services, or property) made to the Foundation by private persons, State or local government agencies, or covered Native entities.
